name: Cheniere Energy, Inc.
content: Cheniere Energy, Inc., a Fortune 500 company headquartered in Houston, Texas, is the leading producer and exporter of liquefied natural gas (LNG) in the United States. The company provides a clean, secure, and affordable energy solution to help meet the world's growing demand for energy. Cheniere operates the Sabine Pass and Corpus Christi LNG terminals, which represent one of the largest LNG export platforms globally. Through its full-service offerings, including gas procurement, transportation, and liquefaction, Cheniere plays a critical role in global energy security and the transition to lower-carbon energy sources.
